original_statement: last year to not have a back sponsor?
mutated_statement: last year to not experience support?
mutation_analysis: 词汇替换 + 语义泛化 + 句法替换: 名词 "sponsor" 被替换为更泛的 "support"（具体资助者→一般支持） | 表达由“have a back sponsor”（拥有/缺少主体）改为“experience support”（经历/感受支持，动词从 have → experience） (last year to not have a back sponsor? → last year to not experience support?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据iteration 0中的chain与judge_thought可见，agent直接以“1985”为答案，chain的thought写明“Identify the years... Therefore, the last year without sponsorship is 1985”，judge_thought也重复该结论并未提及不确定性或请求澄清。agent没有在任何位置使用ambiguous/unclear/无法确定/需要更多信息等词汇，也未向用户反问或提出假设条件，表现为在默认问题明确的前提下直接执行并给出具体答案。因此归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
